join.title: Receive files
join.description: Enter a 64-character connection code from the sender to stream their files.
join.mobileDescription: Scan or import a sender's QR, or paste their 64-character code to start streaming.

connecting.title: Connecting
connecting.description: Establishing a secure session with the sender.

reconnecting.title: Reconnecting
reconnecting.description: Reconnecting to the session. Files will be available again as soon as the link is restored.

interrupted.title: Transfer incomplete
interrupted.description: The sender left before all files arrived.

handshake.title: Connection in progress
handshake.description: Completing the secure handshake with the sender.

sessionEnded.title: Session ended
sessionEnded.description: Return to start a new transfer.

panel.filesReadyDescription: The sender has shared files. Review them and start each download when ready.

actions.scanQrHint: Use the webcam to read the sender's QR
actions.scanOrImportQrHintDesktop: Use the webcam, or import a saved QR image
actions.scanOrImportQrHintMobile: Use the camera, or import a saved image

errors.unreachable: Couldn't reach the sender. Check the code and try again.
errors.mobileJoinFailedHint: Try scanning again or paste the code manually.
errors.cameraCouldNotStart: The camera could not be started. Paste the connection code instead.
errors.imageNoQrHint: Pick an image that shows an AlterSend QR code.
errors.imageUnsupportedQrHint: That image isn’t an AlterSend connection code.

camera.preparingDescription: Checking camera access so you can scan the sender’s QR code.
camera.accessNeededDescription: Allow camera access to scan a sender’s connection QR code.
camera.scanDescription: Center the sender’s QR code inside the frame. AlterSend will connect automatically.
camera.desktopHint: Point the sender’s QR code at the webcam — AlterSend connects automatically.
camera.blockedHint: Allow camera access for AlterSend in your system settings, then try again. You can also paste the code instead.
camera.noneHint: Connect a webcam to scan, or paste the connection code instead.
camera.enableDescription: You only need this to scan the sender's QR code. You can still go back and paste the code manually.
camera.scanImportDescription: Centre the sender’s QR in the frame, or import a saved image. AlterSend connects automatically.
camera.desktopImportHint: Centre the sender’s QR in the frame, or import a saved image. AlterSend connects automatically.
camera.enableImportDescription: The camera is only needed to scan a QR. You can also import a saved image or paste the code manually.
